case_title: ROSE ROBERTA R. DBA PROFESSIONAL HOUSE DOCTORS VS WALSH J.D. et al

docket_entries.description: CONT'D REQUEST BY DEFT DENIED BY JUDGE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSE ROBERTA R. DBA PROFESSIONAL HOUSE DOCTORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALSH J.D. FAY PAUL $3,842.38 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,850.38, DEFT. PAUL WAIVES ANY DEFECT IN SERVICE.
